raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding American Expresss handling of a billing dispute in which a merchant provided written confirmation that a refund was approved, then later reversed that approval. 

I relied on written communications from XXXX XXXX stating that a one-time courtesy refund for a specific shipment had been approved and would be processed within a stated timeframe. After only one of two refunds posted, I contacted the merchant multiple times and was later told that management had declined the previously approved refund. 

I submitted all written documentation to American Express showing the refund approval and subsequent reversal. Despite this, American Express ruled in favor of the merchant. My concern is not a disagreement with merchant policy, but the reversal of a refund that was explicitly approved in writing and relied upon. 

I am requesting that American Express reconsider this dispute under the basis of reliance on written merchant approval, inconsistent merchant communication, and misrepresentation. I am seeking resolution consistent with the documented approval provided to me.
